speaker: speaker1
text: I only want a little off the top and the sides and back to have clean lines .

speaker: speaker2
text: Okay . Is your hair naturally curly or is it a perm ?

speaker: speaker1
text: It's natural . My friend told me you know how to work with curls .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's my specialty . Let me put this around your neck .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have any product that controls frizz ?

speaker: speaker2
text: With the cut I'll give you , we will minimize a lot of that .

speaker: speaker2
text: And when we're done , I'll show you some great stuff to take care of the rest .
